title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXCII. Love And Matrimony.
content:
O rare Harry Parry,
            When will you marry?
        When apples and pears are ripe.
            I'll come to your wedding,
            Without any bidding,
        And dance and sing all the night.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXCII. Love And Matrimony." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
